children.name: Velamen
children.description: Velamen — a genus of ribbon comb jellies in the family Cestidae.

children.name: Velamen parallelum
children.description: Velamen parallelum — a species in the genus Velamen, family Cestidae. Also known as ribbon comb jellies.

children.name: Cestum
children.description: Cestum — a genus of ribbon comb jellies in the family Cestidae.

children.name: Cestum veneris
children.description: Cestum veneris — a species in the genus Cestum, family Cestidae. Also known as ribbon comb jellies.
